summary: Tested Evolution PRO iteration 68: Stripe Webhook for automatic payment confirmation and KPI Tracking (GA4 + Meta Pixel). All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed KPI Tracking panel works correctly in admin sidebar under SISTEMA section.
critical_code_review_comments: Stripe webhook correctly returns 200 even on errors to prevent Stripe retries
Tracking config endpoints properly store and retrieve GA4/Meta Pixel IDs
TrackingConfigPanel has proper data-testid attributes for testing
initTracking() in tracking.js loads config from backend at startup
seed_data_creation: None - used existing tracking config in app_settings collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe webhook endpoint at POST /api/webhook/stripe returns 200 even on errors. Tracking config stored in MongoDB app_settings collection with key='tracking'. KPI Tracking panel accessible via nav-tracking in admin sidebar under SISTEMA section. Test values set: ga4_id=G-UITEST999, meta_pixel_id=555666777888.
features_verified: POST /api/webhook/stripe - returns 200 even with invalid payload/signature (prevents Stripe retries)
GET /api/admin/tracking/config - returns full config with enabled flags
PATCH /api/admin/tracking/config - saves tracking IDs and enabled flags
POST /api/cliente-analisi/checkout - endpoint exists and works with valid user_id
Frontend: KPI Tracking nav item visible in admin sidebar under SISTEMA section
Frontend: TrackingConfigPanel shows GA4 and Meta Pixel fields with toggles
Frontend: Save button works and shows 'Salvato!' confirmation
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads correctly (regression check passed)
